common.tagline: A home to grow in faith, love, and service in the city of Medan.

footer.temaLink: Meaning of the HKBP Transformation Theme 2024 to 2028
footer.temaBlurb: HKBP carries the Transformation theme, changed by the renewal of the mind (Roma 12:2), to become a blessing to the world.
footer.berkat: Sai Tuhan i ma mangaramoti hita. God bless.

hero.eyebrow: Distrik X Medan Aceh · City of Medan
hero.tagline: A home to grow in faith, love, and service in the city of Medan. We are part of Huria Kristen Batak Protestan, the largest Protestant church in Southeast Asia since 1861.

tentang.heading: A Batak church rooted in the Gospel
tentang.p1: Huria Kristen Batak Protestan (HKBP) was founded on 7 Oktober 1861 in Pearaja, Tarutung. From the Batak land, this church grew into the largest Protestant Christian church in Southeast Asia.
tentang.p2: HKBP Glugur serves the congregation in Glugur Darat, Medan. This church is the center of Ressort Medan Utara, Distrik X Medan Aceh.
tentang.logoAlt: Official HKBP logo with a cross, Trinity circle, and the letters HKBP

logo.heading: Every line tells of faith
logo.intro: The HKBP emblem sums up the core of the church's belief. Christ is the Head of the Church who reigns over the world.

items.title: The Cross
items.body: It symbolizes the sacrifice of Jesus Christ. Faith in Christ is the foundation of the church in proclaiming the Gospel and serving others.

items.title: The Trinity Circle
items.body: It pictures the one God in three persons, the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit. This is the center of HKBP's belief.

items.title: The Letters HKBP
items.body: Short for Huria Kristen Batak Protestan. It affirms the identity of a Protestant church born from the Batak people.

ibadah.heading: Come worship together
ibadah.intro: The church doors are open to every member and guest. Here is the regular worship schedule throughout the week.

services.title: Morning Service
services.note: The main service that opens the Lord's day.

services.title: Midday Service
services.note: A family service open to all members and guests.

services.title: Sector Worship
services.note: Partangiangan that rotates among members' homes in each neighborhood.

ibadah.specialHeading: Major Services and Church Feast Days
ibadah.specialIntro: We also hold services on the major Protestant Christian celebrations throughout the year.
ibadah.specialNote: Feast day dates that move follow the yearly church calendar.

pelayanan.heading: Grow in fellowship
pelayanan.intro: Each ministry group walks with the congregation at every stage of life, from children to the elderly.

items.name: Sunday School
items.desc: Children learn faith through Bible stories, singing, and love.

items.name: Naposobulung (NHKBP)
items.desc: A group for young men and women to grow in faith, talent, and togetherness.

items.name: Punguan Ina
items.desc: A fellowship of women in prayer, diakonia, and social service.

items.name: Punguan Ama
items.desc: A fellowship of men who support the church's ministry and building.

items.name: Choir
items.desc: The congregation's choir that praises the Lord through marende and church music.

items.name: Social Diakonia
items.desc: A ministry of love for members who are sick, elderly, and in need.

pagaran.heading: One ressort, one family
pagaran.note: HKBP Glugur is the center of Ressort Medan Utara. Three huria pagaran serve under the same care.
pagaran.pusatDesc: The service center of Ressort Medan Utara under Distrik X Medan Aceh.
desc: Serves the congregation in the Pulo Brayan area, Medan.
Serves the congregation in the Tanjung Mulia area, Medan Deli.
Serves the congregation in the Titi Papan area, Medan Deli.

sejarah.heading: The journey of HKBP
sejarah.intro: This journey of faith began with the preaching of the Gospel in the Batak land until HKBP came to the city of Medan.

items.title: The First Gospel Preaching
items.body: On 7 Oktober 1861 the missionaries opened the mission in the Batak land. This date became the birthday of HKBP.

items.title: Nommensen Arrives
items.body: Ingwer Ludwig Nommensen arrived as an envoy of RMG. He started from Padang, then Barus, on to Silindung.

items.title: Entering the Silindung Valley
items.body: Nommensen settled in Huta Dame, Silindung. From here the Gospel spread across the whole Batak land.

items.title: The First Baptism
items.body: On 27 Agustus 1865 Nommensen baptized four married couples in Silindung.

items.title: The First Ephorus
items.body: Nommensen was chosen as the first Ephorus to lead the ministry of HKBP.

items.title: Nommensen Passes Away
items.body: Nommensen died in Sigumpar. The congregation remembers him as the Apostle of the Batak.

items.title: HKBP Becomes Independent
items.body: At the Sinode Godang 1940, Pdt. K. Sirait became the first Batak Ephorus. HKBP stood as an independent church.

items.title: A World Lutheran Church
items.body: HKBP joined the Lutheran World Federation and gained international recognition.

items.title: Largest in Southeast Asia
items.body: HKBP grew into the largest Protestant Christian church in Southeast Asia with millions of members.

items.title: Serving the City of Medan
items.body: HKBP Glugur stands in Glugur Darat as the center of Ressort Medan Utara, Distrik X Medan Aceh.

banner.title: Church Leadership
banner.desc: HKBP Glugur serves under the care of HKBP and Distrik X Medan Aceh. Here are the leaders for the 2024 to 2028 period.

kepemimpinan.intro1: HKBP Glugur serves under the care of Huria Kristen Batak Protestan and Distrik X Medan Aceh. The church leaders shepherd the congregation, guide the ministry, and keep the teaching faithful to the word of the Lord.
kepemimpinan.intro2: Here is the structure of HKBP leadership at the central level and the leadership of Distrik X Medan Aceh for the 2024 to 2028 ministry period.

banner.title: Member services and terms
banner.desc: A guide to offerings, facility rental rates, and wedding administration requirements at HKBP Glugur.

persembahan.heading: Support the church's ministry
persembahan.note: Send your offerings and support through the church's official account.
persembahan.bungaTitle: Fresh Flower Donations for the Altar
persembahan.bunga: If you would like to give a donation of fresh flowers for the altar, please contact the church at least 3 days before Sunday.

tarif.heading: Church facility rental rates
tarif.introPre: Rates apply to members and the public. Terms as of
items: Hall for events other than na monding
ketentuan: After the traditional ceremony ends, the coffin is moved out of the hall right away.
Use of the church for Christmas is Rp1.500.000 and already includes air conditioning.
A martumpol or pamasumasuon service for non-members is charged Rp500.000. The collection is split 50 percent for the huria. The only instrument provided is a keyboard.
Extra equipment in the church, hall, or GSG: air conditioning, sound system, or lighting Rp300.000 per unit. Video Rp100.000.
A decoration flower fee from outside vendors for the church, hall, or GSG is Rp100.000 per building and is charged to the vendor.
The church's musical instruments and sound system are not used if the congregation brings instruments from outside.
The GSG, hall, or classroom for sector partangiangan and choir groups is only for members whose homes are not adequate.

pernikahan.heading: Engagement and wedding
pernikahan.intro: The requirements for martumpol and tarpasupasu at HKBP Glugur.
steps: Members of HKBP Glugur bring a letter of introduction from the sintua or sector elder. Attach a copy of the Baptism Certificate and Confirmation Certificate.
Non-members of HKBP Glugur bring a Certificate of Congregation Membership from their home church.
Bring 2 paired passport photos, size 6x4. All documents are submitted a week before the day.
A wedding conversation or counseling is held 2 to 3 days before the day by the pastor who gives the blessing.
The martumpol and tarpasupasu ceremonies are provided by the huria.
pernikahan.konselingDesc: Contact the church office to arrange a schedule with the pastor.

banner.title: Alkitab
banner.desc: Choose a version, book, and chapter to read the word of the Lord.

alkitab.p1: Read the full Bible right on the HKBP Glugur site. Three versions are available, the Terjemahan Baru (TB), Terjemahan Lama (TL), and the Batak Toba Alkitab. Choose the version that suits your need.
alkitab.p2: You can choose a book and chapter from the list, or type a reference such as Yohanes 3:16 in the search box to jump straight to the verse. All 66 books of the Perjanjian Lama and Perjanjian Baru can be read for free. It is great for worship preparation, personal quiet time, family worship, and studying the Alkitab together.

banner.title: Buku Ende
banner.desc: Congregational hymns in Batak Toba. Search by number or title.

bukuEnde.p1: Buku Ende is a collection of HKBP congregational hymns in Batak Toba used in worship and fellowship. This page offers 535 songs that you can search by number or title.
bukuEnde.p2: Choose a song to read its lyrics verse by verse. It is useful for Sunday services, sector partangiangan, choir practice, and family worship at home.
bukuEnde.sumber: Lyrics source: public Buku Ende HKBP dataset.

banner.desc: Praise songs in Indonesian. Search by number or title.

kidungJemaat.p1: Kidung Jemaat is a collection of praise songs in Indonesian commonly used in church worship. This page offers 502 songs that you can search by number or title.
kidungJemaat.p2: Choose a song to read its lyrics verse by verse. It suits Sunday worship, Sunday school, family worship, and choir practice.
kidungJemaat.sumber: Lyrics source: public Kidung Jemaat dataset.

banner.title: Built by a volunteer initiative
banner.desc: This site comes from a good intention to serve the congregation and make HKBP Glugur information easier to find.

pengembang.p1: The HKBP Glugur site was developed voluntarily by Bintang Tobing. He works on the product and project management side as well as software development, from the interface to the server.
pengembang.p2: The goal is simple. Make church information easy to access, tidy, and useful for the whole congregation.
pengembang.donasiPre: Want to support keeping this site running? Any donation means a lot through

banner.title: Help us keep the information accurate
banner.desc: Is there content, an article, or data that needs to be corrected or added? Send it through this form. Our team will review it.

permintaan.footnote: Your message is sent to the site administrator for review. We may reach back to you through the email or phone you provide.

tema.heroIntro: Be transformed by the renewal of your mind. A call to grow, be renewed, and become a blessing to the world.
tema.logoAlt: Year of HKBP Transformation logo 2024 to 2028, Roma 12:2
tema.ayat: Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewal of your mind.
tema.apaHeading: What the Year of Transformation is
tema.apaP1: The Year of Transformation is a decision of the Sinode Godang 2024 in the HKBP Strategic Plan 2024 to 2028. Its theme is drawn from Roma 12:2, a call to be transformed by the renewal of the mind.
tema.apaP2: The word transformation comes from the Greek metamorphoo, which means metamorphosis. Spiritual transformation is more than a change of behavior. It is a renewal of the way we think so that we understand God's good and perfect will.
tema.apaP3: Through transformation, HKBP wants to become a church that is more energized, moves more nimbly, is better, is more beautiful, and becomes a blessing to the world.

logoMakna.title: Infinity Loop
logoMakna.body: The endless loop marks the spirit of Ekklesia Reformata Semper Reformanda. The church is continually renewed without end.

logoMakna.title: Butterfly
logoMakna.body: The metamorphosis of the butterfly pictures the journey of transformation. A change that is fundamental and growing.

logoMakna.title: Four Circles
logoMakna.body: The four basic elements forming the logo represent four elements of change: character, promise, culture, and capability.

logoMakna.title: The Cross at the Center
logoMakna.body: The cross is the anchor. Transformation does not stray from the teaching of Christ in every HKBP ministry.

logoMakna.title: Three Supporting Lines
logoMakna.body: The three callings of the church: fellowship (koinonia), witness (marturia), and service (diakonia).

logoMakna.title: Purple and Blue
logoMakna.body: Purple symbolizes repentance, transformation, honor, and glory. Blue affirms the identity of HKBP.

pendekatan.title: Spiritual Discipline
pendekatan.body: The foundation for every person to understand the Lord's will clearly.

pendekatan.title: Unity of Servants
pendekatan.body: The spirit of unity among HKBP servants is the key to transformation.

pendekatan.title: Visionary Congregation
pendekatan.body: The congregation is not only an object of ministry, but a subject that actively serves.

tema.visi: To become a blessing to the world.
tema.misi: To make disciples of Christ who do the Word.
tema.sumber: Source: the official HKBP portal (hkbp.or.id) and the HKBP Year of Transformation Guidebook 2025.

sejarah.title: History of HKBP Glugur
sejarah.heroIntro: The journey of a huria in Glugur Darat, from the roots of faith in the Batak land to becoming the service center of Ressort Medan Utara.
sejarah.lead: HKBP Glugur stands in Glugur Darat, one of the old areas of the city of Medan. This church is more than a place of worship. It is a home for thousands of Batak members who grow together in the middle of the city, and it is the service center of Ressort Medan Utara, Distrik X Medan Aceh.
sejarah.s1p1: The story of HKBP Glugur cannot be separated from the great roots of Huria Kristen Batak Protestan. HKBP was born on 7 Oktober 1861 in Pearaja, Tarutung. From there, through the ministry of Ingwer Ludwig Nommensen who is remembered as the Apostle of the Batak, the Gospel spread across the whole Batak land. HKBP then grew into the largest Protestant Christian church in Southeast Asia.
sejarah.s1p2: As the Batak people moved to the city, that faith moved along with them. Medan became one of the centers of growth for HKBP members away from home, and Glugur Darat became one of the important points of that fellowship.
sejarah.quote: Marsiurupan ma hamu di na porsuk. Bear one another's burdens.
sejarah.s2p1: HKBP Glugur stands at Jl. Pembangunan III No.57A, Glugur Darat II, Kecamatan Medan Timur. Year after year its congregation grew as this area developed. The church grew into a mature and established huria, with a ministry that reaches many families.
sejarah.s2p2: Today HKBP Glugur oversees 16 neighborhoods with 47 Sintua who serve. This number shows a large and well ordered fellowship, where worship, formation, and diakonia run side by side.
sejarah.s3Heading: Becoming the Center of Ressort Medan Utara
sejarah.s3p1: HKBP Glugur was entrusted to be the center of Ressort Medan Utara. Under the same care, three huria pagaran also serve, namely HKBP Pulo Brayan in the Pulo Brayan area, HKBP Marturia in Tanjung Mulia, and HKBP Pardomuan Nauli in Titi Papan. Together with the parent church, they form one family of ministry in Distrik X Medan Aceh.
sejarah.s4p1: The congregation's ministry is led by Congregation Leader Ronni E. Silitonga together with Functional Pastor Rosnila Nellawaty Sihombing. The life of the church is supported by the Sintua and various ministry groups, from Sunday School, Naposobulung, Punguan Ina and Ama, choir, to social diakonia.
sejarah.s5p1: The spirit of togetherness among the congregation was clearly seen on Sunday, 9 Juni 2024. HKBP Glugur held a fundraising celebration for the renovation of the hall and church, and also joined in celebrating the 68th anniversary of HKBP in Medan. Thousands of members attended. The event closed with the giving of ulos, a shared meal, and a donation auction for the building of church facilities.
sejarah.s5p2: Moments like this show that HKBP Glugur is more than a building, it is a fellowship that moves, works together, and keeps the heritage of faith.
sejarah.s6p1: In line with the HKBP theme 2024 to 2028, namely Transformation based on Roma 12:2, HKBP Glugur keeps renewing itself. The presence of this site is one small step in that direction, so that information, worship schedules, bulletins, and ministry are easy for anyone to reach.
sejarah.s6note: Note: some of the early historical records of the congregation are still kept in memory and church documents. For detailed founding data, we suggest contacting the church office at (061) 6611846.
